title: After Enies Lobby: Turning Point
description: In the Post-Enies Lobby storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #10, Franky, Unknown person #19 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #10, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Bring everyone who has no food.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's the beginning of frankly family!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even though you're going far away,

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Ugh....!! Owwww!! tears are coming out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I thought we wouldn't get caught here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If it didn't have a ship- Wright.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All right!! I'll take care of it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: We can count on straw- hat-san.
